questions.question: Write a Python code snippet to discretize a continuous variable 'Age' into bins of size 5 and label each bin as 'Low', 'Medium', and 'High'.

Given two DataFrames, 'df1' and 'df2', concatenate them along the columns using the outer join method. Assume 'df1' has columns 'Column1' and 'Column2', while 'df2' has columns 'Column1' and 'Column3'.

Create a pandas Series from a list of strings and perform case-insensitive string matching. Then, use the 'str.contains' method to search for the word 'Python' in the series. Finally, count the number of occurrences of 'Python'.
questions.hint: Use pandas Series and str.contains method
